channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Kalshi flags more insider trading cases, including politician who appeared on FBoy Island
item.description: The prediction market platform, which has been caught in the middle of a regulatory battle between the feds and the states, is seeking to demonstrate strong controls....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: Apple fixes iOS bug that retained deleted notification data
item.description: Apple has released out-of-band security updates for iPhone and iPad devices to fix a Notification Services flaw that could allow notifications marked for deletion to remain stored on the device. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: 'The Gentlemen' Rapidly Rises to Ransomware Prominence
item.description: Not nearly as polite as the name suggests, the ransomware gang has impressed researchers with its speed in scaling up operations — and its sophistication....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.title: Elon Musk's Tesla reports unchanged bitcoin holdings, books $173 million digital asset loss
item.description: The company's bitcoin stash remained at 11,509 BTC, worth about $880 million at bitcoin's current price of around $78,000....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: New Mirai campaign exploits RCE flaw in EoL D-Link routers
item.description: A new Mirai-based malware campaign is actively exploiting CVE-2025-29635, a high-severity command-injection vulnerability affecting D-Link DIR-823X routers, to enlist devices into the botnet. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: New York demands $3.4B in crypto fines: Inside the fight to turn prediction apps into nonstop leverage casinos
item.description: Top prediction market platforms, including Kalshi and Polymarket, are rushing to offer highly leveraged crypto derivatives at the exact moment state and federal authorities are clashing in court over ...
item.dc:creator: CryptoSlate

item.title: Kyber ransomware gang toys with post-quantum encryption on Windows
item.description: A new Kyber ransomware operation is targeting Windows systems and VMware ESXi endpoints in recent attacks, with one variant implementing Kyber1024 post-quantum encryption. [...]...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: The question isn't whether privacy. It's what sort of privacy
item.description: Blockchains are going private. The only question left is what kind of privacy the industry will build, argues Schiller....

item.title: Self-Propagating Supply Chain Worm Hijacks npm Packages to Steal Developer Tokens
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a fresh set of packages that have been compromised by bad actors to deliver a self-propagating worm that spreads through stolen developer npm tokens. The supply ...
item.dc:creator: The Hacker News

item.title: Bitcoin only 21 days away from real bull market rally? Shorts pile in just as spot demand starts pushing back

item.title: Three Microsoft Defender Zero-Days Actively Exploited; Two Still Unpatched

item.title: Two-Factor Authentication Breaks Free From the Desktop
